memoryArtifacts.description:
BYU Film Number 355556
EGBERT GENEALOGY
Descendants of Egbert Sanderson Collateral Lines A-Z, This genealogy was Collected and organized in 5 volumes by Darrell Dwight Matthews.  Microfilmed May 1963.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Bonarton於1410年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾時，她的父親William Bonarton25歲，母親Lady William Bonarton21歲。她於1429年與Philip Young在英國英格蘭史洛普爾卡納姆結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Bonarton于1410年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾时，她的父亲William Bonarton25岁，母亲Lady William Bonarton21岁。她于1429年与Philip Young在英国英格兰史洛普爾卡納姆结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Bonarton was born in 1410, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Bonarton, was 25 and her mother, Lady William Bonarton, was 21. She married Philip Young in 1429, in Caynham, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Bonarton est née en 1410, à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Bonarton, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lady William Bonarton, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Philip Young en 1429, à Caynham, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Bonarton 1410 in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Bonarton 25 und ihre Mutter Lady William Bonarton 21. Sie hat 1429 in Caynham, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Philip Young geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Bonarton è nata il nel 1410 nel Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William Bonarton, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Lady William Bonarton, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Philip Young nel 1429, nel Caynham, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Bonartonが1410年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアで生まれた時，父William Bonartonは25歳，母Lady William Bonartonは21歳であった。1429年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアケインハムでPhilip Youngと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Bonarton(이)가 1410년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Bonarton(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady William Bonarton(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1429년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 카이함에서 Philip Young(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Bonarton nasceu em 1410, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Bonarton, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Lady William Bonarton, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Philip Young em 1429, em Caynham, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Bonarton родилась в 1410 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Bonarton было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady William Bonarton, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Philip Young в 1429 г. в местности кеинам, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Bonarton nació en 1410, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Bonarton, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Lady William Bonarton, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Philip Young en 1429, en Caynham, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas.
